heading: Alert Conditions
body:
You can configure the following alert conditions in the project-level
[Configure Alert Settings](configure-alerts) page to trigger alerts.

[System: CPU (Steal) % is](<System: CPU (Steal) % is>) occurs when the CPU usage exceeds the
guaranteed baseline CPU credit accumulation rate by the specified
threshold. For more information on CPU credit accumulation, refer to
the AWS (Amazon Web Services) documentation for [Burstable Performance Instances](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AWSEC2/latest/UserGuide/burstable-performance-instances.html).

> **Note:** The [System: CPU (Steal) % is](<System: CPU (Steal) % is>) alert is applicable when
> the EC2 instance credit balance is exhausted. Atlas triggers
> this alert only for AWS EC2 instances that support [Burstable
> Performance Instances](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AWSEC2/latest/UserGuide/burstable-performance-instances.html).
> Currently, these are `M10` and `M20` cluster types.

[System: CPU (User) % is](<System: CPU (User) % is>) occurs when the CPU usage of the
MongoDB process, as normalized by the number of CPUs, exceeds the
specified threshold.
